data.title: Banyan Gold Hires Veteran Dealmaker to Drive AurMac Growth Strategy
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Banyan Gold ( (TSE:BYN) ) has shared an update.

Banyan Gold Corp. has bolstered its executive ranks by appointing veteran mining dealmaker Patrick Langlois as vice president of strategy and corporate development, adding more than 25 years of capital markets and M&A experience to its leadership team. Langlois, who has been involved in over $1.3 billion of gold-sector transactions, including recent high-profile Canadian gold deals, will work closely with CEO Tara Christie as Banyan aims to build itself into a leading domestic gold developer anchored by its AurMac project.

The company said AurMac’s 2026 exploration campaign is already in motion, with five drills turning and 5,749 metres completed to date, while a preliminary economic assessment slated for the second half of this year is expected to define key project economics. Banyan also granted 850,000 stock options to consultants and employees and outlined an active investor-relations schedule at upcoming mining conferences, signalling a push to advance the project and raise its profile among industry and capital-markets stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BYN) stock is a Sell with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banyan Gold stock, see the TSE:BYN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BYN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BYN is a Neutral.

The score is held down mainly by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and materially negative free cash flow) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). A strong, debt-free balance sheet provides some offset, while valuation is difficult to assess due to negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on BYN stock, click here.

More about Banyan Gold

Banyan Gold Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing its AurMac gold project in Yukon’s Traditional Territory of the First Nation of Na-Cho Nyäk Dun. AurMac hosts an indicated mineral resource of 2.274 million ounces of gold and an inferred resource of 5.453 million ounces, and benefits from road access, grid power and other existing regional infrastructure.

The project is located about 40 kilometres from Mayo, Yukon, spans roughly 303 square kilometres and is transected by the main Yukon highway, with a three-phase power line, power station and cellular coverage supporting development. These infrastructure advantages, combined with the scale of the resource, position AurMac as one of Canada’s larger undeveloped gold projects and a key asset in Banyan’s growth ambitions.

Average Trading Volume: 968,555

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$453.6M

For a thorough assessment of BYN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Silly Monks Entertainment Undergoes Management Overhaul After Change in Control
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Silly Monks Entertainment Ltd. ( (IN:SILLYMONKS) ) has provided an announcement.

Silly Monks Entertainment Ltd. has undergone a change in control following the successful completion of an open offer by acquirer Satyapoorna Chander Yalamanchili, who has acquired substantial shareholding and been classified as the new promoter. The former promoter group will be reclassified as public shareholders, and the board has initiated a comprehensive reconstitution to align governance with the new management structure.

The company’s board has appointed Badugu Anish Kumar as managing director and chairman, along with several new additional directors, including both non-executive and independent members. In parallel, multiple existing directors and the chief financial officer have resigned, and the registered office is being shifted within Hyderabad, signaling a broad managerial and operational reset under the new promoter’s control.

More about Silly Monks Entertainment Ltd.

Silly Monks Entertainment Ltd. operates in the media and entertainment sector, focusing on digital content, production, and related services aimed at audiences in India. The Hyderabad-based company is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India and caters to a growing market for regional and online entertainment offerings.

Average Trading Volume: 24,551

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: China Shenhua posts audited 2025 results and plans RMB22.34bn dividend amid industry risks
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

China Shenhua Energy Co ( (HK:1088) ) has issued an update.

China Shenhua Energy Company Limited reported its audited annual results for the year ended 31 December 2025, confirming that the financial statements prepared under IFRS Accounting Standards received a standard unqualified opinion from KPMG. The board and senior management formally attested to the authenticity, accuracy and completeness of the annual report, and the filing satisfies Hong Kong listing requirements for preliminary annual results disclosures.

The board proposed a final cash dividend of RMB1.03 per share for 2025, with an expected total payout of about RMB22.34 billion, to be based on the registered share capital after completion of an ongoing A-share issuance to raise supporting funds. The company highlighted that it faces material uncertainties in meeting its 2026 business targets due to coal and power market dynamics and policy adjustments, and it flagged broader operational, environmental, investment and compliance risks for investors to monitor, while noting there were no improper fund appropriations or guarantee violations during the period.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1088) stock is a Buy with a HK$48.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Shenhua Energy Co stock, see the HK:1088 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Shenhua Energy Co

China Shenhua Energy Company Limited is a joint stock limited company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong, operating in the coal and power generation industries. The group is a major integrated energy producer, focusing on coal production, power generation and related energy operations that are sensitive to industrial policy, market demand and regulatory trends.

Average Trading Volume: 14,716,385

data.title: Shanghai Realway Capital Assets Management Doubles Annual Loss Despite Revenue Growth
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Shanghai Realway Capital Assets Management Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1835) ) is now available.

Shanghai Realway Capital Assets Management reported a 15.4% rise in revenue to RMB30.4 million for 2025, supported by higher other income and gains and fair value increases in certain associates and joint ventures. However, the group continues to operate at a modest scale within the competitive Chinese asset management market and remains exposed to valuation swings in its investment and property portfolios.

Despite the revenue growth, the company’s net loss widened sharply to RMB27.7 million, more than doubling from the prior year, driven by fair value declines in financial assets, a drop in investment property values, higher other expenses and renewed impairment on trade receivables. Loss per share rose to RMB17.62 cents and the board decided not to distribute a final dividend, underscoring continued earnings pressure and a cautious stance toward capital returns for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1835) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shanghai Realway Capital Assets Management Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:1835 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shanghai Realway Capital Assets Management Co., Ltd. Class H

Shanghai Realway Capital Assets Management Co., Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated asset management company listed in Hong Kong that focuses on managing investments through associates, joint ventures and financial assets. The group’s activities span investment in financial instruments and properties, positioning it within China’s broader alternative and real estate-related investment management space.

Average Trading Volume: 39,200

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Shanghai Pioneer Holding Ltd ( (HK:1345) ) just unveiled an update.

Shanghai Pioneer Holding Ltd has proposed a final ordinary cash dividend of HKD 0.054 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, with shareholder approval scheduled for 22 May 2026. The dividend will be paid in Hong Kong dollars on 18 June 2026, with the ex-dividend date set for 3 June and a book close period from 5 to 9 June to determine shareholder entitlement.

The announcement underscores the company’s intention to return cash to shareholders, signaling confidence in its 2025 financial performance and ongoing cash-generating ability. Key dates around the ex-dividend period and record date will be closely watched by investors seeking to capture the payout, while the absence of withholding tax on the declared dividend simplifies the return for eligible shareholders.

data.title: NSING Technologies Sets Up Board-Level Strategic and ESG Committee
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NSING Technologies Inc. Class H ( (HK:2701) ) has issued an announcement.

NSING Technologies Inc. has created a Strategic and ESG Committee under its board of directors to oversee long-term development strategy, major investment decisions and environmental, social and corporate governance matters. The committee is designed to enhance strategic planning, improve the quality and rationality of investment decisions, deepen sustainability-focused reforms and refine the company’s corporate governance structure.

The new body will operate independently of other internal departments, report directly to the board and be composed of three directors led by the company’s chairman. Its establishment aligns the company with Chinese and Hong Kong listing and governance requirements, clarifying director responsibilities and ensuring continuity and proper replacement procedures so the committee can function effectively in guiding strategy and ESG management.

More about NSING Technologies Inc. Class H

NSING Technologies Inc. operates as a publicly listed company subject to corporate governance rules in both mainland China and Hong Kong. The company is focused on strengthening its long-term strategic development, core competitiveness and investment decision-making processes, while integrating environmental, social and corporate governance practices into its management and oversight framework.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Greentown Management Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (HK:9979) ) has provided an announcement.

Greentown Management Holdings Company Limited has declared a final ordinary dividend of RMB 0.0916 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, with the Hong Kong dollar equivalent and applicable exchange rate to be announced later. The dividend is subject to shareholder approval on 26 June 2026, with shares trading ex-dividend on 6 July 2026, a record date of 13 July 2026, and payment scheduled for 17 July 2026, signaling the company’s intention to return cash to shareholders and maintain a regular distribution policy.

The book closure period for determining dividend entitlement will run from 8 July to 13 July 2026, during which share transfers must be lodged with Computershare Hong Kong Investor Services Limited by the specified deadline. The announcement, which involves no withholding tax or related warrant and convertible security adjustments, provides clarity on the company’s capital distribution timetable and offers income visibility to investors amid ongoing scrutiny of returns in the property management sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9979) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Greentown Management Holdings Co., Ltd. stock, see the HK:9979 Stock Forecast page.

More about Greentown Management Holdings Co., Ltd.

Greentown Management Holdings Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company in the equity capital markets, trading under stock code 09979. It operates as a management-focused enterprise within the broader real estate and property services ecosystem, targeting investors seeking exposure to mainland China- and Hong Kong-related property and asset management developments.

data.title: Anjoy Foods Grows Revenue, Expands Assets and Overseas Ambitions Despite Profit Dip
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Anjoy Foods Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2648) ).

Anjoy Foods reported 2025 operating income of RMB16.19 billion, up 7.05% year on year, while net profit attributable to shareholders fell 8.46% to RMB1.36 billion, amid a 19.5% expansion in total assets and a similar rise in net assets. The board proposed a final dividend of RMB1.44 per share, signalling continued shareholder returns despite margin pressure.

Management highlighted strong market response to new product lines such as hot-pot assortments, shrimp paste and premium sausage ranges, supported by a strategy of continuous product iteration and channel optimization. The group is deepening cooperation with new retail platforms, pushing omnichannel distribution, and leveraging social media to shape consumption scenarios and drive demand.

Anjoy is also pursuing aggressive growth initiatives, including the acquisition of Jiangsu Ding Wei Tai to build a frozen bakery division and the launch of the “Anzhai” project targeting domestic and overseas Halal food markets. Following its July 2025 Hong Kong Main Board listing, which made it China’s first A+H listed quick-frozen food company, Anjoy is using the H-share platform to advance its internationalization, including export growth and potential overseas M&A, reinforcing its leadership in the domestic quick-frozen food industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2648) stock is a Buy with a HK$91.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Anjoy Foods Group Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2648 Stock Forecast page.

More about Anjoy Foods Group Co., Ltd. Class H

Anjoy Foods Group Co., Ltd. is a PRC-based quick-frozen food producer, focusing on customized, high-quality products for mass consumers in the domestic market. The company has built standardized, scalable operations and an omnichannel sales network spanning traditional distributors, supermarkets, new retail platforms, and e-commerce, while also accelerating international expansion through its A+H listing structure.

Average Trading Volume: 580,266

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$28.95B

Learn more about 2648 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from China Huarong Asset Management Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2799) ) is now available.

China CITIC Financial Asset Management has released its audited annual results for the year ended December 31, 2025, fulfilling Hong Kong listing requirements for preliminary annual disclosures. The company will distribute printed versions of its 2025 annual report in April 2026 to H-share holders who opted in, and will also publish the full report on both the Hong Kong stock exchange website and its own corporate site.

The forthcoming annual report will provide detailed financial statements, management discussion and analysis, risk and capital management disclosures and corporate governance reports, offering investors a comprehensive view of the firm’s 2025 performance and oversight framework. This level of disclosure is expected to support transparency for stakeholders and help the market assess the company’s operational resilience, risk profile and strategic outlook within China’s evolving financial asset management sector.

China CITIC Financial Asset Management Co., Ltd. is a Chinese financial asset management company operating under the CITIC group, focusing on distressed asset investment, restructuring and related financial services.
